title: Lightly Browned Basque French Cheese Blanquette
description: A floral and adventurous French dish featuring brown rice noodles and a blend of cheeses, perfect for a flexitarian dinner option. This blanquette is a unique and exciting meal to try.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the dehydrated brown rice noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large saucepan, melt the unsalted butter over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook until fragrant.
Sprinkle the shredded gruyere cheese into the saucepan and stir until melted.
Add the heavy cream and dried thyme to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Add the cooked brown rice noodles to the saucepan and stir to coat with the cheese sauce.
Transfer the noodle mixture to a baking dish and top with edible flowers.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with fleur d sel.
